# Best Affiliate Software for SaaS in 2026: SMB Platform Comparison (Refgrow)

**URL:** https://refgrow.com/blog/best-affiliate-software-for-saas-2026
**Retrieved:** 2026-05-20
**Source type:** comparison
**Authority:** high
**Relevance:** high
**Topic:** platform-selection

## Summary

A March 2026 comparison of 8 affiliate platforms for SaaS products. Establishes a tiered ARR-based selection framework: early-stage SaaS ($0–$500K ARR) should use Tolt ($29/mo) or Refgrow (free tier); growing SaaS ($500K–$5M ARR) should use Rewardful or FirstPromoter; enterprise ($5M+ ARR) should use Impact or Everflow. Key differentiator: Rewardful and FirstPromoter both lack an embeddable widget and use external affiliate portals only. FirstPromoter is the only SMB-tier platform supporting Stripe + Paddle + Recurly + Chargebee + Braintree. Tolt is Stripe + Paddle + LemonSqueezy. Rewardful is Stripe + Paddle only. FirstPromoter pricing changed to $49/mo starter (from $99/mo) as of this report, while Tolt is $29/mo flat.

## Key facts for stinger-forge

- **Tolt:** $29/mo flat, unlimited affiliates, no per-referral fees. Stripe + Paddle + Chargebee. Built-in affiliate signup pages. Payouts via Wise or PayPal. Best for pre-revenue to early-stage SaaS ($0–$500K ARR). Setup under 10 minutes with script tag.
- **Rewardful:** Starts at $49/mo (Performance plan). Scales pricing with a percentage of tracked revenue on higher tiers. Stripe + Paddle only. External affiliate portal (no embed widget). Fast setup, no code. Good for Stripe-only SaaS that doesn't need embedded affiliate experience.
- **FirstPromoter:** Starts at $49/mo. Integrates with Stripe, Paddle, Recurly, Chargebee, Braintree - widest billing provider support. Both affiliate and referral programs in one tool. Over 7,000 SaaS companies use it. Best for SaaS with $1M+ ARR.
- **PartnerStack:** Custom pricing (~$500–$1,000/mo). Marketplace of SaaS-focused affiliates. For Series B+ companies with dedicated partnerships headcount.
- **Impact:** Custom pricing, typically $500–$3,000+/mo. Enterprise-only, significant implementation time.
- **Platform decision framework:** ARR tier drives platform selection more reliably than feature comparison alone.
- **Quick comparison table (from source):**
  - Rewardful: $49/mo, Stripe + Paddle, no embed widget, revenue fee on higher tiers
  - FirstPromoter: $49/mo, Stripe/Paddle/Recurly/Chargebee/Braintree, no embed widget, revenue fee
  - Tolt: $29/mo, Stripe/Paddle/Chargebee/LemonSqueezy, no embed widget, no revenue fee
  - Impact: ~$500/mo+, custom contract
